_source: Kurczak & Fish, Art & Science of Vedic Astrology Vol II, Ch.10 'Planetary Friendships' (naisargika/natural maitri).
_note: NATURAL (naisargika) friendship only — permanent, from the planets' innate nature. NOT the temporal (tatkalika) or compound (panchadha) friendship, which depend on placement and are not given in this chapter (flag as a dependency if a surface needs compound maitri). This table is the KEY to dignity, dispositor strength, and every Lajjitaadi avastha (a planet is helped in a friend's sign/aspect, harmed in an enemy's). NB: the Moon has NO enemies.
